nist-srd-20.citation: NIST X-ray Photoelectron Spectroscopy Database, NIST Standard Reference Database Number 20, National Institute of Standards and Technology, Gaithersburg MD, 20899 (2000), DOI: 10.18434/T4T88K.
nist-srd-20.notes: v1 checkpoint values were recovered from Internet Archive snapshots of the SRD 20 web interface because the live v5 application is not machine-readable: query_all_dat_el.asp?elm1={Nb,O,U,Cu} (2004-09-17, v3.5; complete element tables), query_all_dat_el.aspx (2016-02-02, v4.1; page 1 cross-checks incl. the Powe12 evaluated Nb 3d5/2), elm_in_comp_res.aspx?elm1={U,O} (2015-10-27, v4.1; compound values, page 1 of 5), EngElmSrchQuery.aspx Elm={U,O} (2023, v4.1; line inventories only). Per-record reference codes (e.g. Powe12, Seah89, WCSW87) are NIST's own citation keys and are preserved in each transition's notes. All values pending hand-verification against live SRD 20 v5.

scofield-1976.citation: Scofield, J. H. Hartree-Slater subshell photoionization cross-sections at 1254 and 1487 eV. J. Electron Spectrosc. Relat. Phenom. 1976, 8 (2), 129-137. DOI: 10.1016/0368-2048(76)80015-1.

moulder-1992.citation: Moulder, J. F.; Stickle, W. F.; Sobol, P. E.; Bomben, K. D. Handbook of X-ray Photoelectron Spectroscopy; Chastain, J., Ed.; Perkin-Elmer Corporation: Eden Prairie, MN, 1992.
